statement: In every magma, Equation 1714 (`x = (y * x) * ((z * w) * y)`) implies Equation 3401 (`x * y = z * (y * (y * y))`).
lean_statement:
theorem problem_normal_0992
    {G : Type*} (op : G → G → G)
    (h : ∀ x y z w : G, x = (op (op y x) (op (op z w) y))) :
    ∀ x y z w : G, (op x y) = (op z (op y (op y y)))
